assignments.name: resultado
assignments.value: =ℹ️ No hay clientes interesados registrados para el inmueble con código '{{ $('Ejecutar Workflow').item.json.codigo_inmueble }}'.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS client_name,
  c.phone,
  c.email,
  pi.interest_level,
  pi.interest_date,
  pi.notes,
  pi.id AS interest_id,
  p.code AS property_code,
  p.address AS property_address
FROM property_interests pi
JOIN clients c ON c.id = pi.client_id
JOIN properties p ON p.id = pi.property_id
WHERE p.code = $1
  AND p.is_active = true
ORDER BY
  CASE pi.interest_level
    WHEN 'Muy Alto' THEN 1
    WHEN 'Alto' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Medio' THEN 3
    WHEN 'Bajo' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END,
  pi.interest_date DESC;
